narration: The second you own something, your brain secretly triples its value. That's the endowment effect — and it's quietly wrecking your finances right now.
visual: Dark background. 'THE ENDOWMENT EFFECT' title springs in from top in amber. SVG brain outline pops in with spring animation. Large '×3' counter animates from ×1 to ×3 in white. Subtitle fades in below.

narration: Cornell gave students a coffee mug. Owners wanted $7.12 to sell it. Non-owners only offered $2.87. Same mug — but ownership inflated the value 148%. Wild, right?
visual: Light background. Two coffee mugs spring in side by side labeled OWNER (amber mug) and BUYER (white mug). Price tags animate in: $7.12 vs $2.87. '+148% MARKUP' badge pops in at bottom.

narration: In your brokerage account, this gets brutal. Seventy-one percent of traders hold losing stocks twice as long as winners — because selling makes the loss feel real. Average stuck position: nine thousand dollars.
visual: Dark background. Red stock chart line animates drawing downward trend from left to right. '71%' stat counter appears large in red. '$9,200 AVG STUCK POSITION' panel fades in below.

narration: Home sellers are the worst victims. The average seller overprices by 22%, sitting 73 extra days on market — before caving to a lower offer anyway. The endowment effect costs you months of mortgage payments.
visual: Light background. SVG house (triangle roof, rectangle body, windows, door) springs in. '+22% OVER MARKET VALUE' price tag appears. Calendar icon with '73 DAYS' fades in. Strikethrough price with red lower price animates in.

narration: It even traps you at work. Employees who stay two-plus years at one company earn 50% less over their career than job switchers — but leaving feels like losing something you own.
visual: Dark background. Two person silhouettes with growing salary bars. Left bar labeled LOYAL EMPLOYEE (shorter, white). Right bar labeled JOB SWITCHER (taller, amber). '50% MORE LIFETIME EARNINGS' badge animates in.

narration: Beat it with one question: would I buy this today if I didn't already own it? If the answer's no, that's your endowment effect talking. Follow for more money psychology.
visual: Light background. Large question mark SVG pops in with spring. Amber box appears with the question text. Green checkmark circle springs in. Black CTA box fades in: 'FOLLOW FOR MORE MONEY PSYCHOLOGY'.
